title: La muerte insiste
overview: Octavio Izaga, a prestigious lawyer, middle-aged, single and childless, descendant of a prosperous family from Zulia, is the target of anonymous threats accompanied by failed attempts to assassinate him.

trailers.title: LA MUERTE INSISTE  1984 de Javier Blanco
